title: spiraea × mollis
intro: Spiraea × mollis, also known as double-flowered spiraea or Rosebud Spiraea, is a hybrid deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Spiraea × mollis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Spiraea × mollis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
